title: Chef Aid 6 Piece Knife Block Set, Stainless Steel Kitchen Knives with Soft Grip Handles & Universal Matt Finish Knife Block, Includes Chef, Paring, Utility, Bread & Carving Knives
features: COMPLETE KITCHEN KNIFE SET: Includes Paring Knife, Utility Knife, 15cm Chef’s Knife, 20cm Bread Knife, 20cm Carving Knife, and a sleek matt finish universal knife block for all your cooking needs
STRONG & DURABLE: Crafted from high-quality stainless steel for long-lasting sharpness, precision slicing, and rust resistance
SOFT GRIP HANDLES: Designed for maximum comfort and control, the non-slip soft grip handles reduce hand fatigue during extended use
KNIFE BLOCK STORAGE: The versatile knife block accommodates various blade sizes, keeping your kitchen organised and your tools easily accessible
MODERN AND PRACTICAL DESIGN: Sleek matte finish complements any kitchen décor while offering everyday functionality for both home cooks and aspiring chefs
